name: document_mining_agent
description: Ingests documents into the Knowledge-IQ RAG corpus with AI-powered analysis, metadata tagging, and accessibility scope control (organization vs department).

skills.name: Analyze Document
skills.description: AI-powered analysis of document content to extract category, type, keywords, topic, and suggested accessibility scope.

output.suggested_departments: Departments most likely to need this document
output.analysis_summary: Human-readable summary for presenting to user

examples: Analyze this sales contract before uploading
What type of document is this?

skills.name: Upload Document to Knowledge Base
skills.description: Upload a document with full metadata tagging: source agent attribution, document category/type, keywords, and accessibility scope. Always runs analysis first and confirms scope with user.

input.source: Google Drive URL or GCS URI (alternative to extracted_text)
input.source_agent: Agent or system that triggered this upload (e.g. crm_agent)

output.tags_applied: All metadata tags applied to the document

examples: Upload this Q3 revenue report accessible to finance and executive only
Add this engineering spec to the knowledge base for the whole org
Index this sales contract — crm_agent requested it for the sales department

skills.name: List Knowledge Base Documents
skills.description: List uploaded documents with optional filters by scope, department, or source agent.

output.documents: List of documents with name, scope, and departments

examples: Show all documents uploaded by the CRM agent
List documents accessible to the sales department
What documents are in the knowledge base?
